_meta.description: Single source of truth for cascade task execution. AI agents MUST read this file before starting any work.

phases.name: Documentation Integrity
phases.gate: All P0 tasks must be completed before P1 starts

tasks.title: Fix cascade-state.json — replace demo with real project tasks
tasks.acceptance: cascade-state.json contains real 3A Studio tasks, not demo placeholder
tasks.anti_hallucination: Read the file and verify it has project: '3A Studio' and real task titles

tasks.title: Create scripts/install-hooks.ts referenced by postinstall
tasks.acceptance: scripts/install-hooks.ts exists and copies git hooks from anti-hallucination-guard/.git-hooks/ to .git/hooks/
tasks.anti_hallucination: Run bun install and verify no error from postinstall script

tasks.title: Remove dead docs/ links from README.md and WORKFLOW.md
tasks.acceptance: No links to docs/AGENT_TYPES.md, docs/ROADMAP.md, docs/PROMPTING_MODULE.md, docs/research/agent-typology-full.md remain in README.md or WORKFLOW.md. Either restore the files or remove the links.
tasks.anti_hallucination: Grep for all 4 paths in README.md and WORKFLOW.md — zero matches

tasks.title: Update 3A-Studio-Documentation.md — fix stale numbers
tasks.acceptance: API endpoints: 66, Prisma models: 37, node types: 20, wiki pages: 15, formulas: 10, frameworks: 11, techniques: 17, i18n namespaces: 8, feature modules: 17
tasks.anti_hallucination: Each number verified: find src/app/api -name route.ts | wc -l == 66, prisma schema model count == 37, etc.

tasks.title: Sync README.md with codebase reality
tasks.acceptance: Monorepo Packages shows 5 (including verify-docs submodule), i18n shows 8 namespaces, Screens count is accurate, no contradictions with 3A-Studio-Documentation.md
tasks.anti_hallucination: Cross-check every number in README against actual file counts

tasks.title: Update WORKFLOW.md — fix Security section and dead links
tasks.acceptance: Security section reflects JWT auth DONE, key masking DONE. No broken docs/ links remain. Roadmap Phase references are consistent.
tasks.anti_hallucination: Grep for 'TODO' and 'FIXME' in Security section — zero results for completed items

tasks.title: Fix UNIFIED_TASK_LIST.md Quick Start commands
tasks.acceptance: Quick Start uses bun (not pnpm, not npm). All scripts match package.json scripts field.
tasks.anti_hallucination: Every command in Quick Start exists in package.json scripts

tasks.title: Update .env.example with all documented variables
tasks.acceptance: .env.example contains: DATABASE_URL, DIRECT_URL, AUTH_SECRET, ENCRYPTION_KEY, ADMIN_USERNAME, ADMIN_PASSWORD, ZAI_API_KEY, ZAI_BASE_URL
tasks.anti_hallucination: Every variable from README Environment Variables table exists in .env.example

phases.name: Wave 8 — Production Readiness
phases.gate: All P0 must be completed. P1 tasks depend on documentation being accurate.

tasks.title: Multi-user auth — replace demo admin/admin with NextAuth.js or Clerk
tasks.acceptance: User registration/login via OAuth provider. RBAC with at least 2 roles (admin, user). Demo credentials removed.
tasks.anti_hallucination: POST /api/auth/login with demo credentials returns 401. Real OAuth flow completes end-to-end.

tasks.title: API Rate Limiting for /api/llm and /api/flows/[id]/execute
tasks.acceptance: Rate limit enforced on LLM endpoints. Returns 429 when exceeded. Configurable per-provider.
tasks.anti_hallucination: Send 100 requests in 1 minute — 429 returned after limit

tasks.title: Standards seeding — seed 19 reviewed standards into DB
tasks.acceptance: All 19 standards from Zai-agent-toolkit/standards/ imported into DB. GITHUB_STANDARD contradiction (3.1 vs 5.4) resolved. Quality score >= 8/10 for all.
tasks.anti_hallucination: GET /api/standards returns 19 records. Each has >= 1 enabled rule with valid pattern.

tasks.title: API integration tests — cover critical routes
tasks.acceptance: Integration tests for: auth chain (login/protected/logout), agent CRUD, skill CRUD, flow execute, standards cross-ref delete. Minimum 35 tests passing.
tasks.anti_hallucination: vitest run --reporter=verbose shows all new tests passing

tasks.title: Phase 4 — Agent-Scanner: QA on zai-agent-toolkit (110+ skills)
tasks.acceptance: Agent-scanner with tools (read_file, grep, compare) replaces static QA parsing. Tested on 110+ real skills. Format-agnostic.
tasks.anti_hallucination: Scanner produces results for 3 different skill formats (MD, TS, JSON) without format-specific code

tasks.title: Phase 5 — 9-Metric Quality Engine (SonarMAS)
tasks.acceptance: 9 weighted metrics calculated. Grade A-F badge. Radar chart visualization. 7 anti-pattern detectors. Skill/Standard classification.
tasks.anti_hallucination: POST /api/quality/deep returns all 9 metric scores + grade. Radar chart renders in UI.

tasks.title: Phase 6 — Advanced Agent Types (ReAct, Plan-and-Execute, Prompt Chaining, Autonomous, Parallel/Voting)
tasks.acceptance: 7 deferred agent type templates implemented. Each with system prompt, node config, and test flow.
tasks.anti_hallucination: Each agent type executable in Flow Editor with real LLM call producing structured output
